title: Day 4 Lesson 1 - Video Repetition
html:
The focus of this repetition is on these sentences:  

Sentence 1 - あさごはんをたべます か。 (Asagohan o tabemaska?) = Do you eat breakfast?

Sentence 2 (positive answer) - はい、 たべます。(Hai, tabemas) Yes, I do.

Sentence 3 - あさごはんをたべます か。 (Asagohan o tabemaska?) = Do you eat breakfast?

Sentence 4 (negative answer) - いいえ、たべません。(Iie, tabemasen) = No, I do not.

How to use this lesson - Please watch the video twice (first with the subtitles and then without them) and repeat the sentences.
